claim: Evidence agent results with missing, clarify, block, or failed status create PRD readiness blockers via recommendation and missing field checks.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function implements the blocking logic: checks for missing items (lines 496-502) and problematic recommendations/verdicts/statuses (lines 503-509), returning an array of blocker objects.
If missing.length > 0, pushes blocker with code EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, including the role and listing specific missing items in the message.
evidence.why: Missing evidence directly creates blockers preventing PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: If recommendation is clarify/blocked/block OR verdict is blocked/block/fail/failed OR status is blocked/failed/error, pushes EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED for clarify or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED for other problematic states.
evidence.why: Clarify, block, and failed recommendations become blockers against PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness iterates required evidence roles (line 711), checks for complete results (line 713), and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each result (line 721) to populate blockerList.
evidence.why: Integration point: evidence agent blockers are aggregated into the final blockers array.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is computed as blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker in the blockers array prevents PRD readiness from becoming true.
evidence.why: Final gate: evidence agent blockers directly control PRD readiness status.

evidence.summary: Test case cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result verifies that when cross-checker or verifier results are missing, EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers are added and prd_ready is false; when all agents complete with proceed recommendation, prd_ready is true.
evidence.why: Test proves missing required agent results block PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case evidence conflicts and existing blockers prevent PRD readiness verifies that when cross-checker or verifier return block recommendation, EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blockers are added and prd_ready is false.
evidence.why: Test proves block recommendations prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness verifies that when cross-checker has missing items and clarify recommendation, both EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers are added and prd_ready is false.
evidence.why: Test proves missing field and clarify recommendations become blockers that prevent PRD readiness.

risks: If the evidence agent blocking logic has bugs or edge cases, incomplete evidence could incorrectly produce prd_ready true.
If evidence agent results are malformed or missing required fields, blockers might not be generated correctly.

result.notes: Independent verification confirms: evidenceResultBlockingIssues (lines 481-511) checks missing items (496-502) and problematic recommendations/verdicts (503-509), returning blockers; inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls this for each result (line 721); prd_ready is blockers.length === 0 (line 750). Tests at lines 246-286 prove missing and clarify create EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers with prd_ready false. Note: prd_ready computation is at line 750, not 738 as explorer stated (line 738 is where blockers array is assigned via uniqueBlockers).
